blended.narrative: Mont-Sainte-Anne is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,733 ft. Looking ahead, 65 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 15" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 8" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 27" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
